'''âth-j-h-sh''' ('''kathajheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ult|ult]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ult|ult]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-j-h-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathajheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithajheshoko|thithajheshoko]] || [[word:jithajheshoko|jithajheshoko]] || [[word:shithajheshoko|shithajheshoko]] || [[word:kithajheshoko|kithajheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthajheshoko|thuthuthajheshoko]] || [[word:jujuthajheshoko|jujuthajheshoko]] || [[word:shushuthajheshoko|shushuthajheshoko]] || [[word:kukuthajheshoko|kukuthajheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthajheshoko|thuthajheshoko]] || [[word:juthajheshoko|juthajheshoko]] || [[word:shuthajheshoko|shuthajheshoko]] || [[word:kuthajheshoko|kuthajheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthajheshoko|thuthajheshoko]] || [[word:juthajheshoko|juthajheshoko]] || [[word:shuthajheshoko|shuthajheshoko]] || [[word:kuthajheshoko|kuthajheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethajheshoko|thethajheshoko]] || [[word:jethajheshoko|jethajheshoko]] || [[word:shethajheshoko|shethajheshoko]] || [[word:kethajheshoko|kethajheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothajheshoko|thothothajheshoko]] || [[word:jojothajheshoko|jojothajheshoko]] || [[word:shoshothajheshoko|shoshothajheshoko]] || [[word:kokothajheshoko|kokothajheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothajheshoko|thothajheshoko]] || [[word:jothajheshoko|jothajheshoko]] || [[word:shothajheshoko|shothajheshoko]] || [[word:kothajheshoko|kothajheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothajheshoko|thothajheshoko]] || [[word:jothajheshoko|jothajheshoko]] || [[word:shothajheshoko|shothajheshoko]] || [[word:kothajheshoko|kothajheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthajheshoko|thĂŠthajheshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthajheshoko|jĂŠthajheshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthajheshoko|shĂŠthajheshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthajheshoko|kĂŠthajheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathajheshoko|thathathajheshoko]] || [[word:jajathajheshoko|jajathajheshoko]] || [[word:shashathajheshoko|shashathajheshoko]] || [[word:kakathajheshoko|kakathajheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathajheshoko|thathajheshoko]] || [[word:jathajheshoko|jathajheshoko]] || [[word:shathajheshoko|shathajheshoko]] || [[word:kathajheshoko|kathajheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathajheshoko|thathajheshoko]] || [[word:jathajheshoko|jathajheshoko]] || [[word:shathajheshoko|shathajheshoko]] || [[word:kathajheshoko|kathajheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathajheshithi|shathajheshithi]] || [[word:shathajheshiji|shathajheshiji]] || [[word:shathajheshishi|shathajheshishi]] || [[word:shathajheshiki|shathajheshiki]]
